caption: High dose of AAV9/MFSD8 GT tends to decrease GFAP immunoreactivity in the brain and spinal cord of KO mice.High (5 × 1011 vg/mouse) or low (1.25 × 1011 vg/mouse) dose of AAV9/MFSD8 vector was administered i.t. to equal numbers of male and female mice at P7–P10. Scale bars: 300 μm (cortex); 500 μm (hippocampus, cerebellum, spinal cord).
